task_completion.description: Verify that the DICOM image is loaded and visible in a DICOM viewer application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medical imaging viewer window is open displaying an X-Ray Angiography image.

task_completion.description: Verify that a distance measurement line has been drawn on the central prominent structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line segment with measurement endpoints (and likely a numeric distance value) is visible over the central structure in the X-Ray image.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurement properties dialog is opened to edit the line's attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, context menu, or properties panel specific to the selected measurement line is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurement line is labeled exactly 'Aortic Root'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Aortic Root' is visible inside the label text field of the properties dialog, or directly rendered next to the measurement line on the image.

task_completion.description: Verify that the annotated image is exported as a PNG to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog is visible with the filename 'labeled_vessel.png' and the directory path pointing to '~/DICOM/exports/' or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/', or a file manager/terminal shows the file successfully created at that location.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with a genuine DICOM viewer GUI to perform the measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement and labeling are done within a medical viewer interface, not via terminal commands, scripts, or generic image editors like GIMP.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export dialog belongs to the DICOM viewer application, rather than the agent taking a system screenshot and saving it via command line tools.

integrity.description: Verify that the label was applied via the measurement properties, not just pasted as generic text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The label 'Aortic Root' is entered in a specific measurement properties field or natively attached to the measurement tool, rather than using a generic free-text annotation tool to fake the label.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/labeled_vessel.png'. The label applied to the measurement line must be exactly 'Aortic Root'. The exported file must be a valid image with a file size of at least 5000 bytes.
